---
title: "Afrooz Razi"
description: |
  Welcome to Afrooz Razi's website
site: distill::distill_website

image: "afr.HEIC"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/afroozrazi/"
  - label: Twitter
    url: "https://twitter.com/raziafro0z"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/raziafrooz"
  - label: Email
    url: "raziafro0z@gmail.com"
output:
    postcards::trestles
    
---
 
## Bio

My name is Afrooz Razi and I am from Tehran,Iran. 
I am a 3rd year PhD student at Human Genetics Department.
I love to be active, play sports, take long walks with my dog, and hangout with friends.

## Education

**University Of Maryland** | College Park, MD 

**Johns Hopkins** | Baltimore, MD
